channel.title: Home on Trang Le
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Trang Le

item.title: Witchie Creamery
item.description: Witchie is a personal project for an ice cream shop with a magical aesthetic theme and a modern twist — a must-go destination for all the young witchcraft lovers. To fully bring out their characteristics, this identity concept uses a combination of brush and sans-serif typefaces, with funky-cute looking illustrations and a bold, simple color scheme.

item.title: Anemoia
item.description: anemoia (n.): nostalgia for the time one have never known. — Anemoia is a female fashion brand that is inspired by Victorian and Edwardian aesthetics. They aim to bring back the classy look of the era, but with a more modern and casual feel; a look into a faraway past.

item.title: QUALIFARM
item.description: QUALIFARM is a chain grocery store in Hanoi, Vietnam, delivering clean, high-quality, yet affordable food. The brand’s concept is designed to bring out these very aspects - vibrant, yet elegant; organic, yet carefully constructed.

item.title: Nhai Ben Magazine
item.description: Nhai Ben Magazine is a magazine run by the students of FPT High School (Hanoi, Vietnam). Inspired by magazines like T-pot Journal and Kinfolk, Nhai Ben offers a look into the life of FPT students, along with various articles about lifestyles, education, etc. I worked on this magazine as the lead designer from 2016 to 2019, and from 2019 onwards I work alongside other members as a mentor.

item.title: Various posters - vol.1
item.description: Some posters made during my second year in School of Art, University of Manitoba.
